session_status: S119 PLANNING — P1 = B2 phase (a) runHostTick extraction. KARPATHY research -> Full PDR -> A.0 state gate -> 2-round 3-way Council -> PRIME-AUDIT -> user gate.
council_result: S119 Full-tier 2-round Council (Grok-4.20-reasoning DISRUPTOR + Gemini-2.5-pro AUDITOR, 1 call each). Gemini APPROVE (extraction+gate 5/5). Grok 4 challenges: granularity-split OVERRULED (2.75v1.75 domain vote, byte-identity mandate); EffectSink SUPERSEDED (R2/PRIME-AUDIT traced edge watchers as SHARED client+host -> watchers stay verbatim in main.ts tail, NO event seam needed in phase a — R1 events design would have broken client music/teardown); shake-drift OVERRULED w/ proof (no render mid-drain + replace semantics -> render-identical); replay-gate-insufficient CONCEDED (added frozen-reference differential test + 1000 ticks + forced-state scenarios); godly-contract-doc CONCEDED (mermaid+contract into WORKER_SIM_FOUNDATION.md); BotManager-render-risk REFUTED empirically (bots import only sim modules); perf.mark probe UNANIMOUS ADOPT.
